Story By: Lindsay Lee

Lindsay Lee has built quite the reputation as a rideshare driver — her backseat has seen more action than most people’s bedrooms. Though Gigi insists she’s straight, Lindsay’s persistence and charm start breaking down her walls — until their lips finally meet.
